summary:
I've been deeply engaged in building and refining a SaaS crypto algo trading platform (summit), integrating LLM-driven decision-making for exit strategies, position sizing, and scanner cadence. The platform underwent a major rename from Trader to Strategy, with a reusable expert pool and a quorum-based exit signal routing. On the firmware side, I developed feature-rich mouse and keyboard emulation firmware for ESP32-S3 (j-uni-hid), iterating through multiple versions with BLE, USB, and touch support. I also built a Windows input filter driver (input-driver) from scratch, adding push-style event delivery and integration tests.

Alongside these primary projects, I conducted extensive research on crypto price prediction models (crypto-model-research), achieving state-of-the-art results with Mixture of Experts architectures. I built an Android TTS app (j-tts-android) supporting multiple engines and Russian text normalisation, and an LLM-powered Android assistant (ozwil-android) with sub-agent delegation and tool routing. I also worked on computer vision for poker hand detection (poker-cv), a Windows Explorer tagging utility (intag2), and numerous Freqtrade trading strategies and monitoring tools. The year also included work on an autonomous coding assistant (auto-claude), a Telegram multi-bot manager, and various smaller utilities.

items.title: SaaS crypto algo trading platform
items.description: Built and refined the trading platform with LLM-driven exit strategies, scanner cadence model, UI typography overhaul, and backend rename from Trader to Strategy.

items.title: CV generation toolchain
items.description: Maintained the personal CV generator, adding LLM voice enforcement, dry-run mode, and heatmap improvements.

items.title: Minimal AutoHotKey alternative
items.description: Built a lightweight input automation tool with interception support, scenario engine, and conditions system.

items.title: ESP32-S3 firmware development
items.description: Developed firmware v13 with fire-and-forget emitting and 8x8 matrix variant for mouse and keyboard emulation.

items.title: Windows input filter driver
items.description: Shipped v1.2 with push-style event delivery, integration tests, and library predicates for the WDK driver.

items.title: Windows Explorer tagging utility
items.description: Fixed desktop.ini encoding for non-ASCII folder metadata to ensure proper rendering in Explorer.

items.title: Android TTS app
items.description: Built the TTS app with multiple engines (Piper, VITS, F5-TTS), pitch control, and Russian text normalisation.

items.title: CV generator enhancements
items.description: Added project cards with pulse charts and workflow rebase retries to the CV generation pipeline.

items.title: Aim assist and YOLO inference
items.description: Refactored YOLO inference to DirectML, added bow/flick tracking, and improved aim assist modes.

items.title: Firmware fixes and variants
items.description: Fixed dying/disconnect issues in firmware v13 and drafted the v13s8x8 variant.

items.title: Tagging utility maintenance
items.description: Fixed changelog generation and preserved existing desktop.ini entries when writing folder metadata.

items.title: Aim assist improvements
items.description: Added HP aim scaling, debug overlay, and YOLO confidence threshold UI.

items.title: E-ink reader firmware
items.description: Added Map app, Knowledge Base app, FB2 encoding fixes, and optimized map renderer for Apple Silicon.

items.title: Proxy client enhancements
items.description: Added XHTTP transport support via rebased mihomo and bumped Clash.Meta.

items.title: Crypto price prediction research
items.description: Conducted extensive experiments with MoE architectures and ensemble methods, achieving best combined F1 of 0.7817.

items.title: LLM-powered Android assistant
items.description: Rewrote sub-agent architecture with session-based delegation, added tool routing strategies, and improved model settings UI.

items.title: Overlay and autofire for aim assist
items.description: Rewrote overlay to D3D11+D2D, added status window, autofire, and YOLO model loading.

items.title: E-ink reader UI and features
items.description: Rewrote MapApp UI to landscape, added tile server, and improved FB2 support.

items.title: E-ink launcher development
items.description: Overhauled backdrop, added swipe page navigation, status bar control, and gesture zones.

items.title: Firmware version releases
items.description: Released v12 (dual-core) and v13 (USB) firmware variants for ESP32-S3.

items.title: CI and release pipeline overhaul
items.description: Restructured CI pipelines for manual triggering, added auto-draft releases, and fixed Store submission workflows.

items.title: Tagging utility documentation
items.description: Updated README for v2.0 release and added privacy policy for Microsoft Store submission.

items.title: Telegram node for n8n
items.description: Fixed auth race condition, upgraded CI test version, and added album trigger.

items.title: Code intelligence engine
items.description: Added LSP integration, dead code detection improvements, and expanded language support with tree-sitter.

items.title: Neovim configuration
items.description: Updated Neovim config for 0.11 API, added secret detection pre-commit hook.

items.title: YOLO labeler tool
items.description: Added multi-select mark mode and Ctrl+Delete deletion for fast annotation.

items.title: Dotfiles management
items.description: Added SSH keys and initial chezmoi-managed dotfiles.

items.title: Poker hand detection from video
items.description: Achieved 99% hand detection accuracy, added blinds detection, and built pipeline for poker state recovery from video.

items.title: Firmware COM fix
items.description: Fixed graceful COM restart in firmware.

items.title: Aim assist updates
items.description: Added updates to modes and fixes.

items.title: Claude Code n8n node
items.description: Updated to Claude Agent SDK v0.2.12 and fixed abort controller cleanup.

items.title: Task management app
items.description: Improved UX with direct launch, completed status, and touch event visualization.

items.title: Freqtrade trading strategies
items.description: Developed and optimized numerous trading strategies including Fenix, botman, and ns531 variants with parameter tuning and backtesting.

items.title: Telegram multi-bot manager
items.description: Built a web app with Docker support for managing multiple Freqtrade bots via Telegram, including daily profit calculations and authentication.

items.title: Firmware v11 development
items.description: Continued firmware development with v11 featuring new devices, BLE improvements, self-reporting, and performance profiles.

items.title: Autonomous coding assistant

items.title: Telegram automation tool
items.description: Maintained the Telegram bot with summarization, image dedup, and multi-target sending.

items.title: Freqtrade monitoring app
items.description: Built a Flutter monitoring app with charts, card UI, and import/export functionality.

items.title: Aim assist initial development
items.description: Initial development with USB-HID rate limiting and aim assist integration.

items.title: Telegram node for n8n
items.description: Added Alpine Linux support and Docker deployment for the Telegram node.

items.title: Tagging utility updates
items.description: Added metadata property support and privacy policy for Store submission.

items.title: Content collector tool
items.description: Built a content collector with webhook and ad filtering.

items.title: Trading strategy development
items.description: Developed and optimized trading strategies with hyperopt and leverage adjustments.

items.title: Telegram automation initial work
items.description: Initial development of Telegram automation tool with forwarding and logging.

items.title: Tagging utility initial work
items.description: Initial work on Windows Explorer tagging utility with UI polish.
